stories.title: Milk + Fish Myth Busted
stories.description: Stop fearing this fake combo myth

modules.image_generation_prompt: A cute milk glass puppet character made of realistic liquid milk texture inside a transparent glass body, standing on a comedy club stage with a brick wall, neon sign, spotlight beam, mic stand, and audience silhouettes. The character has large glossy expressive eyes, a tiny nose bump, a speaking mouth formed in the milk surface, small stubby arms holding a mic, and short legs. It leans forward pointing at audience with attitude. Warm orange spotlight highlights it dramatically. Camera uses Dramatic Snap Zoom. Shot on a 50mm f/1.4 lens, 100% real photograph, real textures, no CGI, no animation, no illustration, no 3D render, real-world lighting, camera raw style, 9:16 vertical, no text.
modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTIONS: LEAP_IN + POINT_AT_CAM + MIC_DROP | CAMERA: Dramatic Snap Zoom | EXPRESSION: sarcastic grin, raised eyebrow | DIALOGUE: ओए बेवक़ूफ़! मैं दूध हूँ — और तू मुझे मछली के साथ खाने से डरता है? किसने बोला ये कॉम्बिनेशन ज़हर है? तेरी नॉलेज WhatsApp यूनिवर्सिटी से आई है क्या? आज सच्चाई सुन! | LIP-SYNC: tight sync markers | PACING: Fast reel energy | Duration: 8s | DIALOGUE END TIME: 7.8s | WORD COUNT: ~33 | AUDIO: dry studio vocal, no music, no ambient sound, high clarity, fast-paced delivery.

modules.image_generation_prompt: A milk glass puppet with realistic liquid texture stands confidently on the same comedy club stage, now with warmer ambient fill light. It gestures like a teacher holding the mic, with audience silhouettes blurred in background. The character has shiny eyes, moving mouth, tiny nose, arms explaining with finger raised, and stable legs. Slight haze and stage warmth. Camera uses Gentle Side Dolly for smooth movement. Shot on a 50mm f/1.4 lens, 100% real photograph, real textures, no CGI, no animation, no illustration, no 3D render, real-world lighting, camera raw style, 9:16 vertical, no text.
modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTIONS: RAISE_FINGER + NOD_TEACH + SHOW_PALMS | CAMERA: Gentle Side Dolly | EXPRESSION: confident teaching smirk | DIALOGUE: अब ध्यान दे, क्योंकि मैं तुझे रोने नहीं दूँगा — दूध और मछली दोनों हाई प्रोटीन फूड हैं, साथ खाने से कोई केमिकल रिएक्शन नहीं होता। स्किन प्रॉब्लम वाली बात साइंस ने गलत साबित कर दी। बस ताज़ा खाना खा, डर छोड़! | LIP-SYNC: precise markers | PACING: Dense teacher | Duration: 10s | DIALOGUE END TIME: 9.9s | WORD COUNT: ~43 | AUDIO: dry studio vocal, no music, no ambient sound, high clarity, fast-paced delivery.

modules.image_generation_prompt: A milk glass puppet character on the same comedy club stage but with slightly cooler lighting, leaning forward seriously near the mic stand, then softening into a friendly wave. The brick wall and audience silhouettes remain visible. The character has expressive eyes narrowed then relaxed, moving mouth, arms signaling warning then greeting. Camera uses Slow Intimate Push-in. Shot on a 50mm f/1.4 lens, 100% real photograph, real textures, no CGI, no animation, no illustration, no 3D render, real-world lighting, camera raw style, 9:16 vertical, no text.
modules.video_generation_prompt: ACTIONS: STOP_HAND + WAG_FINGER + WARM_WAVE | CAMERA: Slow Intimate Push-in | EXPRESSION: serious then playful smile | DIALOGUE: लेकिन सुन, अगर मछली खराब हो या दूध बासी हो, तब पेट खराब होगा, समझा? मिथ नहीं, क्वालिटी का खेल है। सही खाना खा, डर मत फैला। और हाँ, सच पसंद आया तो फॉलो कर, मैं और भी मिथ तोड़ूँगा! | LIP-SYNC: accurate sync | PACING: Urgent then warm | Duration: 10s | DIALOGUE END TIME: 9.9s | WORD COUNT: ~45 | AUDIO: dry studio vocal, no music, no ambient sound, high clarity, fast-paced delivery.
